name: Gamay Primeur
notes: Crunchy red cherry, faint white pepper, gluggable. Honest primeur, no more, no less.

name: Cuvée Des Galets
notes: Warm herbs, ripe plum, easy tannin. Won't change your life, but does the job.

name: La Pause
notes: Bright morello, mineral edge, lifted on the palate. Drank it slowly because we wanted to.

name: Lumière des Sens
notes: Wild herbs, dark cherry, the unmistakable Robinot whisper of volatility. The kind of bottle you want to start again the moment it's empty.

name: Lumière des Sens
notes: Iron, blood orange, garrigue, then a long mineral fade. Confirmed it wasn't a fluke.

name: Quand Tu Balances, Je Te Tiens au Bout du Doigt, et Te Ramène Vers Moi
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Reductive at first, blew off into white peach and sea salt. Rewarded patience without quite reaching brilliance.

name: The sound of people clapping improves when it’s raining
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Cloudy gold, ginger and quince, oxidative in the good way. Steen at his most approachable.

name: Cuvée Briand
notes: Black olive, leather, ripe but composed. Reliable, no surprises.

name: Cuvée Larmand
notes: Plummy with a green streak, slightly hot. Drinkable, but muddled in the middle.

name: Möhlin
notes: Thin, herbal, vinegary on the finish. Off bottle or off style. Either way, not for us.

name: Nocturne
notes: Peppery as expected but oddly diluted, lacked the usual nerve. An off bottle from a great producer.

name: Vin de Soif
notes: Light, lifted, finished before pudding. Exactly what the name promises.

name: We can do what I can’t
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Big bottle, brooding wine, slightly hot. The format flattered it more than the contents deserved.

name: Vi Sin Num
grapes: Carignan, Grenache Blanc, Grenache Gris, Grenache Noir, Mourvèdre
notes: Aged complexity, dried fig, sea spray, still alive at ten years. Worth keeping the rest.

name: Schlehe
notes: Apricot skin, savoury edge, medium weight. Smart orange, no posturing.

name: Cuvée Les Lèches
notes: Waxy, muted, a touch hot on the finish. Hoped for more from this cuvée.

name: Cuvée Les Lèches
notes: Same evening, second bottle, same verdict. The wine, not the bottle.

name: Feel Good
notes: Walnut, dried apple, a fine oxidative edge. Flirts with Jura without going full vin jaune.

name: Lumière de Silex
notes: Wax, lanolin, a sharp lemon spine. Robinot in a quieter register, still unmistakably his.

name: Lumière des Sens
notes: Sustained intensity, fine grain, the volatile lift kept reframing itself. Half a point off perfection for reasons we couldn't quite name.

name: Lumière des Sens
notes: Opened slowly at magnum pace, into iron and blood orange. The format flattered it; the wine deserved it.

name: Camille
notes: White pepper, raspberry, the Pineau d'Aunis kick. Found its stride twenty minutes in.

name: Les Vignes des Enfants
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Inky, peppery, more structure than Steen usually shows, and it carried.

name: Les Années Folles
notes: Pale onion skin, sour cherry, light pepper. Pleasant aperitif, not memorable.

name: I Like It When Your Fingertips Slide Through My Hair
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Apricot and acacia on the nose, then a hollow middle and short finish. Promised more than it gave.

name: Hey you Girl with the brown shoes on
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Aged Chardonnay glow, hazelnut, lemon curd, sustained acidic spine. Steen showing off, kindly.

name: Hey you Girl with the brown shoes on
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: First taste of this one, and it landed. Hazelnut and lemon curd, generous, with a long finish. The kind that makes you reorder.

name: Dansons jusqu’aux Rêves
producer: Anders Frederik Steen & Anne Bruun Blauert
notes: Amber, beeswax, dried mango, a slight bitter twist. Twelve years on, still has things to say.
